body:
This PR implements the formulation of the default preconditioner for GPU following Marshall J. et al., "Finite-volume, incompressible Navier Stokes model for studies of the ocean on parallel computers" (here called `SimplifiedInversePreconditioner`)

Also, the `Jacobi` preconditioner has been removed as it gives no benefits in terms of speed

labels.description: So things don't blow up and boil the lobsters alive
labels.name: numerics 🧮

title: Adds a correct simplified Inverse preconditioner
